---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, target, or behavior change for ccgate
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What user-facing problem are you trying to solve? Concrete
scenario, not a generic "would be nice if". -->

## Proposal

<!-- What you would like ccgate to do. Include CLI shape / config
field / hook event etc. if relevant. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What you tried first, or what would happen if ccgate did nothing. -->

## Compatibility

<!-- If this involves a breaking change (CLI flag removal, config
field removal, file-path change), call it out so we can plan a minor
bump and the CHANGELOG entry. -->

## Notes

<!-- Optional: links to upstream Claude Code / Codex CLI hooks docs,
related PRs / issues, prior art in other tools. -->
